description: CompositionGreen jacket made of 100% polyester that has black panel on the upper shoulders and sleeves, attached hoodie with laces, zippered front placket, zippered insert pockets on the sides, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, mesh lining made of 100% polyester, ribbed hemline and vented seam on the back where the mesh lining can be seenFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryLook on trend in this green jacket from nike. The polyester outer and the mesh lining provide good insulation and comfort while the vent on the upper back seam allows for better air-flow. The hood provides better protection from the elements. Wear this with jeans, long sleeve tees and sports footwear when the weather gets chilly.
